'''Attakril Meats''' was a small company based on [[Kidron/Legends|Kidron]] that provided a variety of meats in bulk quantities to [[Restaurant/Legends|restaurants]] and grocery stores throughout the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. They competed with [[Tozzin Foods]] and had offices located in the [[Elrood Bazaar]].

{{Company-stub}}
